name: vagabonding
description:
Rolf Potts's Vagabonding — an executable toolkit for long-term world travel: how to break free from the conventional path, save money for extended travel, embrace uncertainty on the road, and turn travel into a way of life rather than a brief escape.

Covers 5 use cases:
① Breaking Free — overcome the myths that keep you from extended travel, reframe your relationship with time and work
② Financial Preparation — save aggressively, simplify your life, build a travel fund
③ Planning & Logistics — plan just enough without overplanning, handle visas, gear, health
④ On the Road — navigate new cultures, make friends, stay safe, embrace uncertainty
⑤ Coming Home — reintegrate after long-term travel, apply travel wisdom to daily life.

Trigger when users say: "Long-term travel" "How to travel the world" "Quit job to travel" "Travel on a budget" "Extended trip planning" "How to afford travel" "World travel tips" "Solo travel" "Backpacking" "Travel lifestyle" "Digital nomad" "How to start traveling" "Travel fear" "Overcome travel anxiety" "Life-changing travel"
or mention: Rolf Potts / vagabonding / long-term travel / budget travel / world travel / travel lifestyle.

Related skills: the-millionaire-fastlane, the-slight-edge, the-happiness-advantage, clear-thinking-book.
useCase: Helps anyone who dreams of long-term travel overcome the practical and psychological barriers — from saving money and simplifying their life to navigating uncertainty on the road and reintegrating after returning home.
knownRisks: Vagabonding advice reflects a Western perspective on travel; safety, visa, and cost considerations vary by nationality and destination.
